Stamp Total LV.name: Stamp Total LV
Stamp Total LV.desc: Your Tome Score of # PTS is in the Top $ of all players in IdleOn! @   @ If you can reach ~ PTS, you'll be in the Top ` of all players!

Total Talent Max LV \u819b (Tap for more.name: Total Talent Max LV 膛 (Tap for more info)
Total Talent Max LV \u819b (Tap for more.desc: For each talent, the tome counts the highest Max LV out of all your players.

Unique Quests Completed \u819b.name: Unique Quests Completed 膛
Unique Quests Completed \u819b.desc: Doing the same quest on multiple players doesn't count for this.

Most Spore Caps held in Inventory at onc.name: Most Spore Caps held in Inventory at once

Average kills for a Crystal Spawn \u819b.name: Average kills for a Crystal Spawn 膛
Average kills for a Crystal Spawn \u819b.desc: This tracks your Crystal Mob spawn chance! While this is capped at 1 in 100, you get BONUS Exp and Drops if your Crystal Spawn is better! For example, if your average kills is 20, you're getting 5x Exp and Drops from Crystals!

Most DMG Dealt to Gravestone in a Weekly.name: Most DMG Dealt to Gravestone in a Weekly Battle 膛
Most DMG Dealt to Gravestone in a Weekly.desc: Gravestone appears when you defeat all weekly bosses. This is the negative number shown after.

Highest Killroy Score on a Warrior.name: Highest Killroy Score on a Warrior

Highest Killroy Score on an Archer.name: Highest Killroy Score on an Archer

Highest Killroy Score on a Mage.name: Highest Killroy Score on a Mage

Fastest Time to kill Chaotic Efaunt (in.name: Fastest Time to kill Chaotic Efaunt (in Seconds)

Best Non Duplicate Goblin Gorefest Wave.name: Best Non Duplicate Goblin Gorefest Wave 膛
Best Non Duplicate Goblin Gorefest Wave.desc: Non Duplicate means you can only place 1 of each Wizard Type, 2 or more invalidates the attempt.

Total Digits of all Deathnote Kills \u81.name: Total Digits of all Deathnote Kills 膛
Total Digits of all Deathnote Kills \u81.desc: For example, 1,520 kills would be 4 digits, and this is for all monster types.

Most Tottoise in Storage \u819b.name: Most Tottoise in Storage 膛
Most Tottoise in Storage \u819b.desc: Tottoise is the 11th Shiny Critter unlocked from the Jade Emporium in World 6

Most Greenstacks in Storage \u819b.name: Most Greenstacks in Storage 膛
Most Greenstacks in Storage \u819b.desc: Greenstack is when you have 10,000,000 or more of a single item in your Storage Chest.

Fastest Time reaching Round 100 Arena (i.name: Fastest Time reaching Round 100 Arena (in Seconds)

Most Giants Killed in a Single Week.name: Most Giants Killed in a Single Week

Fastest Time to Kill 200 Tremor Wurms (i.name: Fastest Time to Kill 200 Tremor Wurms (in Seconds)

Total Artifacts Found \u819b.name: Total Artifacts Found 膛
Total Artifacts Found \u819b.desc: Rarer versions of an artifact count for more, so an Ancient Form Artifact counts as +2, Eldritch Form counts as +3, and so on...

Total Golden Food Beanstacks \u819b.name: Total Golden Food Beanstacks 膛
Total Golden Food Beanstacks \u819b.desc: Supersized Gold Food Beanstacks count as 2 Beanstacks!

Total Career Summoning Wins \u819b.name: Total Career Summoning Wins 膛
Total Career Summoning Wins \u819b.desc: Rack up those wins! Endless Summoning wins count for this too, of course!

Familiars Owned in Summoning \u819b.name: Familiars Owned in Summoning 膛
Familiars Owned in Summoning \u819b.desc: Measured in terms of Grey Slime, so a Vrumbi would count as 3, Bloomy as 12, and so on.

Total Minigame Highscore \u819b.name: Total Minigame Highscore 膛
Total Minigame Highscore \u819b.desc: This is Choppin game, Mining Cart game, Fishing game, Catching Hoops game, and Trapping game

Total Land Rank \u819b.name: Total Land Rank 膛
Total Land Rank \u819b.desc: Land Ranks are from the Farming skill, in World 6. Unlocked from the Night Market!

Most Balls earned from LBoFaF \u819b.name: Most Balls earned from LBoFaF 膛
Most Balls earned from LBoFaF \u819b.desc: LBoFaF means Lava's Ballpit of Fire and Fury, the bonus round in Arcade

Total Arcade Gold Ball Shop Upgrade LV.name: Total Arcade Gold Ball Shop Upgrade LV

Total Gambit Time (in Seconds) \u819b.name: Total Gambit Time (in Seconds) 膛
Total Gambit Time (in Seconds) \u819b.desc: Gambit is the 14th Cavern in The Hole.

Total Digits of all Cavern Resources \u8.name: Total Digits of all Cavern Resources 膛
Total Digits of all Cavern Resources \u8.desc: For example, if you had 1273 gravel and 422 gold dust, thats 7 Digits. If you then got 23 quaver notes from harp, thats another 2 digits, making your total 9 Digits.

Best Bravery Monument Round \u819b.name: Best Bravery Monument Round 膛
Best Bravery Monument Round \u819b.desc: Bravery Monument is the 4th Cavern in The Hole. The Hole is found in World 5.

Best Justice Monument Round \u819b.name: Best Justice Monument Round 膛
Best Justice Monument Round \u819b.desc: Justice Monument is the 10th Cavern in The Hole. 'Best Round' here means your highest Court Case reached in a run.

Best Wisdom Monument Round \u819b.name: Best Wisdom Monument Round 膛
Best Wisdom Monument Round \u819b.desc: Wisdom Monument is the 13th Cavern in The Hole.

Best Deathbringer Max Damage in Wraith M.name: Best Deathbringer Max Damage in Wraith Mode 膛
Best Deathbringer Max Damage in Wraith M.desc: Deathbringer is the Blood Berserker's Master Class, given by Masterius NPC in World 6. You need to open your grimoire to register damage.

Best Dawg Den score \u819b.name: Best Dawg Den score 膛
Best Dawg Den score \u819b.desc: The Dawg Den is the 3rd Cavern in The Hole. The Hole is found in World 5.

Total Resource Layers Destroyed \u819b.name: Total Resource Layers Destroyed 膛
Total Resource Layers Destroyed \u819b.desc: Destroying Layers includes the following caverns... Motherlode, Eternal Hive, and Evertree Cavern, with more added later!

Best Pure Memory Round Reached \u819b.name: Best Pure Memory Round Reached 膛
Best Pure Memory Round Reached \u819b.desc: Yea nah, I aint snitchin'. This is a SECRET mode.

Spirited Valley Emperor Boss Kills \u819.name: Spirited Valley Emperor Boss Kills 膛
Spirited Valley Emperor Boss Kills \u819.desc: This counts your current Showdown for the Emperor boss in World 6, not the total amount of kills.

Total Summoning Boss Stone victories \u8.name: Total Summoning Boss Stone victories 膛
Total Summoning Boss Stone victories \u8.desc: This is the TOTAL wins you have against all Summoning Bosses combined. These are the bossfights from the stones, like the one next to Tribal Shaman NPC!

Total Coral Reef upgrades \u819b.name: Total Coral Reef upgrades 膛
Total Coral Reef upgrades \u819b.desc: The Coral Reef is a feature in World 7 town, unlocked by rescuing Humble Hugh's missing Fishies!

Deepest Depth reached in a single Delve.name: Deepest Depth reached in a single Delve 膛
Deepest Depth reached in a single Delve.desc: This is for the Spelunking skill, it's just the deepest you've gone in a single attempt.

Total Ninja Knowledge Upgrades LV \u819b.name: Total Ninja Knowledge Upgrades LV 膛
Total Ninja Knowledge Upgrades LV \u819b.desc: Ninja Knowledge is the upgrade tree accessed within Sneaking. This includes mini knowledge upgrades, but you'll unlock those later...

Best Windwalker Max Damage in Tempest Mo.name: Best Windwalker Max Damage in Tempest Mode 膛
Best Windwalker Max Damage in Tempest Mo.desc: Windwalker is the Beast Masters's Master Class, given by Masterius NPC in World 6. You need to open your Compass to register damage.

Best Arcane Cultist Max Damage in Arcani.name: Best Arcane Cultist Max Damage in Arcanist Mode 膛
Best Arcane Cultist Max Damage in Arcani.desc: Arcane Cultist is the Bubonic Conjuror's Master Class, given by Masterius NPC in World 6. You need to open your Tesseract to register damage.

Biggest Haul in a single Delve \u819b.name: Biggest Haul in a single Delve 膛
Biggest Haul in a single Delve \u819b.desc: This is for the Spelunking skill, it's just the most amount of Amber you've gotten in a single attempt.

Total Spelunk Discoveries made \u819b.name: Total Spelunk Discoveries made 膛
Total Spelunk Discoveries made \u819b.desc: A Discovery is when you destroy a rock for the first time in a cave. It's basically how many unique 'things' you've encountered while spelunking!

Highest leveled Spelunker \u819b.name: Highest leveled Spelunker 膛
Highest leveled Spelunker \u819b.desc: In other words, this is the Spelunking LV of the highest leveled spelunker in your account.

Lava Dev Streams watched \u819b.name: Lava Dev Streams watched 膛
Lava Dev Streams watched \u819b.desc: To get +1 Stream Watched, you need to tune in at Twitch.tv/ Lava贫Flame2 and keep an eye out for when I enable +1 TOME mode! It'll happen multiple times per stream.

Nametags Found \u819b.name: Nametags Found 膛
Nametags Found \u819b.desc: This only counts the amount of unique nametags you found... but don't throw away your duplicate nametags! You'll need them for The Gallery in World 7!

Premium Hats Found \u819b.name: Premium Hats Found 膛
Premium Hats Found \u819b.desc: This metric is based on the total hats you've deposited to the Hat Rack in World 3!

Minehead Opponents Defeated \u819b.name: Minehead Opponents Defeated 膛
Minehead Opponents Defeated \u819b.desc: Haven't heard of Mr Minehead's Depth Charge game yet? It's great, you'll find it deep in World 7!

Rat King Crowns Reclaimed \u819b.name: Rat King Crowns Reclaimed 膛
Rat King Crowns Reclaimed \u819b.desc: The Rat King is one of the last Import Items you buy in Gaming, and he unlocks the ROYALE sprout mutation, which, when harvested, has a chance to reclaim Crowns!

Farming Stickers Found \u819b.name: Farming Stickers Found 膛
Farming Stickers Found \u819b.desc: You need to unlock the Sticker Depot from Research in World 7, and grow some Megacrops to find Stickers!

Tournaments Registrations \u819b.name: Tournaments Registrations 膛
Tournaments Registrations \u819b.desc: This metric tracks how many days you've registered for a Tournament! It currently caps at 365, so you aren't permanently behind if you miss a day!

Total Research Grid Upgrades \u819b.name: Total Research Grid Upgrades 膛
Total Research Grid Upgrades \u819b.desc: Research is a World 7 skill, you need to progress past the Ballonfish Map to unlock it!

Total Glimbo Trades \u819b.name: Total Glimbo Trades 膛
Total Glimbo Trades \u819b.desc: Glimbo can be found deep in World 7, he increases your Upgrade Vault max LV's in exchange for valuable items!

Unique Sushi Created \u819b.name: Unique Sushi Created 膛
Unique Sushi Created \u819b.desc: Basically, the highest Tier of Sushi you've created over at the Sushi Station in World 7!

Button Presses \u819b.name: Button Presses 膛
Button Presses \u819b.desc: This is referring to THE BUTTON, found in the Mantaray map in World 7! This map is the 12th map away from town, to give you an idea of where this map is.
